content.claim: Hungary's population declined by 334,000 individuals (3.4%) over the decade preceding the 2022 census, the largest inter-census drop on record, directly shrinking the school-age cohort feeding rural primary schools nationwide.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Aggregate national figure does not specify rural/village-specific birth-rate trajectories
Does not account for internal migration redistribution within the cohort
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
